category_sources: source_facts.description says eot-utils converts fonts from OTF/TTF to EOT; official W3C index describes mkeot and eotinfo.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is eot-utils; official W3C tool directory is /Tools/eot-utils.
docs_sources: Official W3C eot-utils directory and README document mkeot and eotinfo.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official W3C source is distributed from https://www.w3.org/Tools/eot-utils/ but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies OTF/TTF to EOT conversion; official W3C README names mkeot and eotinfo for EOT font work.
